title: Case-To-Public Learning Extraction Gate v0

sources.label: Case-To-Cure Stage Validator And Owner Map v0
Caregiver Intake Public Projection Validator v0
Consent Privacy Security Retention Gate v0
Multiple Myeloma Synthetic Case-To-Cure Pipeline v0

limitations: Public sanitation and publication-gate scaffold only.

Does not inspect, process, extract, summarize, de-identify, publish, or authorize use of real case data, patient-identifying data, raw records, portal exports, molecular reports, pathology reports, flow reports, genomics reports, images, notes, exact dates tied to a person, clinician names, site names tied to a person, sponsor contacts, private paths, private prompts, private case IDs, or re-identification keys.
Does not copy private correspondence, unpublished expert comments, reviewer deliberation, private permission context, private reviewer identities, or private contact details.

Does not authorize single-case claims, public case reports, case-derived claims, generated biomedical claims, patient-specific outputs, patient matching, trial matching, target actionability, source ranking, evidence ranking, target ranking, mechanism ranking, product ranking, therapy ranking, trial ranking, option ranking, recommendations, sequencing, comparison, prioritization, private-lab work, legal clearance, regulatory readiness, ethics readiness, security readiness, retention decisions, emergency handling, publication, release, or clinical decisions.
Does not validate end-to-end synthetic dry-run or master-completion audit semantics.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured or that a vaccine has been found.
